description: List of Sega Master System Cartridges This software list is current as of MAME 0.214 The Master System —renamed and with a redesigned casing from the original Sega Mark III , which had been released in the Japanese market in 1985—is a video game console released by Sega in the North American market in June 1986 to compete with the Nintendo Entertainment System , which had been released in the same market in February 1986 (an earlier test market for NES in New York and California occurred in October 1985). Originally priced at $200 USD, North American distribution rights for the console were acquired by Tonka before Sega re-acquired the rights themselves and released a further streamlined redesign ( Master System II ) of the console during the launch of the Sega Genesis . The Master System was later released in Europe in September 1987, in South Korea in April 1989 and in Brazil in September 1989 where distribution rights were given to Tec Toy . A re-release of the console in the Japanese market under the new Master System brand and redesign occurred that same year. 20 em 1 (Bra) The Three Dragon Story (Kor) 4 PAK All Action (Aus) 94 Super World Cup Soccer (Kor) After Burner (World) Ace of Aces (Euro) Action Fighter (Euro, USA, Bra, v2) Action Fighter (v0, prototype) Action Fighter (Euro, Jpn, v1) Action Fighter / Mo zhan che (Taiwan) The Addams Family (Euro) Aerial Assault (Euro, Bra) Aerial Assault (USA) Andre Agassi Tennis (Euro, Bra) Agigongnyong Dooly (Kor) Air Rescue (Euro, Bra, Kor) Disney's Aladdin (Euro, Bra, Kor) Aleste (Jpn) Alex Kidd BMX Trial (Jpn) Alex Kidd - High-Tech World (Euro, USA) Alex Kidd in Miracle World (Euro, USA, v1) Alex Kidd in Miracle World (Euro, USA, v0) Alex Kidd in Miracle World 2 (World, hack) Alex Kidd in Miracle World (Bra, v1, Pirate) Alex Kidd no Miracle World (Jpn) Alex Kidd - The Lost Stars (World) Alex Kidd in Shinobi World (Euro, USA, Bra) Alf (USA, Bra) Alibaba and 40 Thieves (Kor) Alien³ (Euro, Bra) Alien Syndrome (Euro, USA, Bra) Alien Syndrome (Jpn) Alien Syndrome (Prototype) Altered Beast (Euro, USA, Bra) American Baseball (Euro, Bra) American Pro Football (Euro) Anmitsu Hime (Jpn) Arcade Smash Hits (Euro) Argos no Juujiken (Jpn) Argos no Juujiken (Jpn, Pirate?)
